name: Green Chilies and Rice Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1/4 lb (4 oz.) Monterey Jack cheese, Cut into small cubes
1 can diced green chili peppers, rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, heat oil over medium-high heat.
2. Add rice and stir until the rice is coated with oil and heated through.
3. Add boiling water and salt (if desired). Bring to a boil over high heat.
4. Reduce heat to low and cook for 20 to 25 minutes or until the water is absorbed.
5. Spray a 12 x 7 1/2 x 2 inch glass baking dish with Pam cooking spray.
6. Combine cooked rice with sour cream.
7. Spread half of the rice mixture on the bottom of the baking dish.
8. Sprinkle diced green chili peppers over the rice mixture.
9. Add the cubed cheese, then the rest of the rice mixture, and finally the grated cheese.
10. Cover and refrigerate until ready to serve.
